name: UTM Zone 37S forward and inverse (Arc 1960 / UTM zone 37S — EPSG::21037)

source.notes: Transverse Mercator, central meridian 39°E, false easting 500000 m, false northing 10000000 m (southern hemisphere), scale factor 0.9996. Used for most of Kenya (longitude 36°E to 42°E).

cases.name: Nairobi (Arc 1960 lat/lon → UTM 37S)
cases.notes: Cross-checked against QGIS on-the-fly projection and against a known Nairobi beacon.

roundtrip_test.description: Forward then inverse must reproduce the input geographic coordinates to within 1e-9 deg (~0.1mm).
